FSElevate
Overview Buttons Cards Forms Badges Gamification
Elevate / Components / Buttons
Component

Buttons

Action styles for lessons, quests, labs, account flows, and destructive operations.

Usage

Use buttons for explicit actions only. Primary buttons should represent the main next step in a learning flow.

  • Use .btn-primary for the page or card's highest-value action.
  • Use .btn-subtle and .btn-ghost for secondary actions.
  • Use .btn-danger only for destructive or reset actions.
Intent variants Buttons 
<button class="btn btn-primary">Start lesson</button>
<button class="btn btn-success">Submit lab</button>
<button class="btn btn-subtle">Save draft</button>
<button class="btn btn-ghost">Skip</button>
<button class="btn btn-danger">Reset attempt</button>
Sizes and icon button Sizing 
<button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm">Small</button>
<button class="btn btn-primary">Default</button>
<button class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">Large</button>
<button class="btn btn-icon" aria-label="Open command menu">C</button>
Grouped controls Segmented action 
<div class="btn-group" aria-label="Lesson view">
  <button class="btn btn-subtle">Theory</button>
  <button class="btn btn-subtle">Practice</button>
  <button class="btn btn-subtle">Review</button>
</div>
